# HPD.ML.DataSources.ParquetDataHandle

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Kind: `class`

IDataHandle backed by an Apache Parquet file. Supports zero-copy columnar batch access via TryGetColumnBatch. Schema is read from Parquet metadata (no inference scan needed).

Implementation requires Parquet.Net dependency. Core methods are stubbed with NotImplementedException until the dependency is added.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ParquetDataHandle : HPD.ML.Abstractions.IDataHandle
```
